meaning: adj.三目的 (指双目显微镜另备有一透镜作照相记录用的显微镜)
examples: To realize accurate 3d scene matching, a trinocular stereo matching scheme based on edge segment was developed.
To acquire range information quickly and effectively, a trinocular active range sensor based on structured light is suggested in this paper.
One method of adjusting the dynamic homography of the vision cell is proposed to realize the global trinocular positioning without blind areas.
